Wish I could rate more than 5! Seeing the sea lions was the #1 thing on my list of things to do. We only spent about 20 minutes but it was so fun to watch and listen to them chat and play and lay and swim.

After a lunch on the pier we went to see them specially; it has become an attraction in all respects; they are "beached" on wooden platforms to rest or argue; there are many people ecstatic by them and they make a lot of laugh as they move and argue with each other, they dive into the sea to cool off and climb up.
Definitely to see and show the kids.

Any time we are in San Francisco, this has become a ‘must stop’ to hear and watch the sea lions. The population seems to have grown and they have more platforms for them to hang out on. There is signage about the history of these mammals living there. If you visit Pier 39 you will hear them long before you see them. Take a look! They are fun to watch!
